mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND STATUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE nickname = #{nickname} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.insert: insert into Member( MEMBER_NO, id, pwd, nickname, email, phone ) values( MEMBER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{id}, #{pwd}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{phone} )
mapper.select: select * from member where id=#{id} and status ='Y'
mapper.update: update Member set nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, pwd = #{pwd}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE where id = #{id}
update Member set nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET PWD = #{pwd}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE ID = #{id} AND STATUS = 'Y'

UPDATE MEMBER SET STATUS = 'N', MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE, ID = ID || '_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), EMAIL = EMAIL || '_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDDHH24MISS'), nickname = nickname || '_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE ID = #{id} AND STATUS = 'Y'
